["Hey @8bit_thug, I'm Sneh. Saw your TX tournament post - that OG squad energy is unmatched. We built ProposalBiz for exactly this kind of chaos - when you're too busy celebrating wins to deal with proposal paperwork. AI builds the whole thing while you focus on what matters.", "Honestly same feeling with proposals, used to stay up 
till midnight fixing them then sending and hearing
